com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ISecurityProfileInternetResource

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    SecurityProfileInternetResource

    public interface ISecurityProfileInternetResource
    Interface of description of an allowed Internet resource of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getAddress()
      Gets Internet resource address
      String getDescr()
      Gets Internet resource description
      String getName()
      Gets Internet resource name
      int getPort()
      Gets Internet resource port
      String getProtocol()
      Gets the Internet resource access protocol
      String getSPName()
      Gets security profile name
      void setAddress(String address)
      Sets Internet resource address
      void setDescr(String descr)
      Sets Internet resource description
      void setName(String name)
      Sets Internet resource name
      void setPort(int port)
      Sets Internet resource port
      void setProtocol(String protocol)
      Sets the Internet resource access protocol
      void setSPName(String spName)
      Sets security profile name
